legal.cookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.
legal.essentialCookiesDesc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled.
legal.analyticsCookiesDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
legal.marketingCookiesDesc: These cookies are used to display relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.
legal.rememberSettings: Remember your language and theme settings
legal.cookieManagementDesc: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time using the cookie settings button in the footer.
legal.browserSettingsDesc: You can also control cookies through your web browser settings.
legal.contactUsDesc: If you have questions about our cookie policy, please don't hesitate to contact us.
legal.essentialCookiesList: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled.
legal.analyticsCookiesList: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
legal.marketingCookiesList: These cookies are used to display relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.
legal.trackPageViews: Track page views and user interactions
legal.understandFeatures: Understand which features are most popular
legal.displayRelevantAds: Display relevant ads based on your interests
legal.measureEffectiveness: Measure how effective our ads are
legal.limitAdFrequency: Limit how often you see the same ad
legal.showRelevantAds: Show ads for services you might be interested in
legal.cookieBannerDesc: When you first visit our website, you'll see a cookie banner where you can choose which types of cookies to accept. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in our footer.
legal.thirdPartyCookiesDesc: Some cookies are set by third-party services we use. You can manage these through their respective privacy settings:
legal.disablingEssentialCookies: Disabling essential cookies may prevent the website from functioning properly
legal.repeatedLogin: You may need to log in repeatedly if session cookies are disabled
legal.preferencesNotSaved: Your preferences may not be saved between visits
legal.featuresMayNotWork: Some features may not work as expected
legal.updatesToPolicyDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on our website.
privacy.introductionDesc: True Farming ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services related to Guild Wars 2 farming optimization.
privacy.emailAddress: Email address (for account creation and communication)
privacy.discordId: Discord ID (if you choose to link your Discord account)
privacy.pagesVisited: Pages visited and time spent on our website
privacy.featuresUsed: Features used and interactions with our tools
privacy.guildWars2DataDesc: If you provide your Guild Wars 2 API key, we collect game data to personalize your experience:
privacy.characterInfo: Character information (only if you provide API keys)
privacy.tradingPostData: Trading Post data and market information
privacy.noPrivateData: No private or sensitive game data is stored
privacy.improveTools: Improve our tools and add new features
privacy.dataSharingDesc: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only with trusted service providers who help us operate our website.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can manage most of these rights directly through your account settings or by contacting us.
dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: Manage your personal data and privacy settings
dataManagement.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to access this page.
dataManagement.overviewDesc: Here's what data we have about you and how it's being used.
dataManagement.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, download, and delete your personal data at any time. Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
dataManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.

salvage.note.title: Note
salvage.note.common: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Common Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Copper-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.masterwork: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Unidentified Gear (Masterwork) opened and then salvaged with Runecrafter's Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.
salvage.note.rare: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Rare Unidentified Gear opened and then salvaged with Silver-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.

fourWinds.overview.p1: The Four Winds Festival is an annual event that celebrates the cultural diversity of Tyria. With activities like Queen's Gauntlet and Boss Blitz, it offers unique opportunities to obtain valuable rewards and exclusive materials.
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.title: Queen's Gauntlet
fourWinds.cards.gauntlet.desc: A series of combat challenges that reward unique tokens and valuable materials.
fourWinds.cards.blitz.title: Boss Blitz
fourWinds.cards.blitz.desc: Cooperative event where teams compete to defeat bosses quickly.
fourWinds.cards.tokens.title: Festival Tokens
fourWinds.cards.tokens.desc: Main festival currency. Exchange for unique Tome of Knowledge

halloween.overview.p1: The Halloween Festival in Guild Wars 2 is one of the best farming opportunities. With activities like the Mad King's Labyrinth and Trick-or-Treat Bags, you can generate significant amounts of gold in a short time.
halloween.cards.bags.title: Trick-or-Treat Bags
halloween.cards.bags.desc: The bags contain random items with different drop rates. Price analysis helps you determine if it's profitable to open them.
halloween.cards.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.cards.lab.desc: The labyrinth is the main activity. With a good route and group, you can obtain hundreds of bags per hour.
halloween.cards.corn.title: Candy Corn
halloween.cards.corn.desc: The main festival material. Its prices fluctuate during and after the event, creating trading opportunities.
halloween.calculator.title: Custom Halloween Calculator
halloween.calculator.emptyTip: Use the buttons above to add items
halloween.strategies.title: Farming Strategies
halloween.strategies.lab.title: Mad King's Labyrinth
halloween.strategies.lab.routeDesc: Follow a specific route to maximize bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.groupDesc: A group of 5 people can obtain 200+ bags per hour.
halloween.strategies.lab.timingDesc: The best times are during server peak hours.
halloween.strategies.tp.title: Trading Post
halloween.strategies.tp.earlyDesc: Buy bags before the festival when prices are low.
halloween.strategies.tp.sellDesc: Sell specific items when their prices reach peaks.
halloween.strategies.tp.cornDesc: Take advantage of Candy Corn price fluctuations.

festivals.description: Specific calculators and guides to maximize your profits during annual festivals
festivals.info.title: What are Festivals?
festivals.info.description: Festivals in Guild Wars 2 are seasonal celebrations that occur throughout the year. Each festival has its own theme, unique activities, and special rewards. These events typically last about 3 weeks and offer unique opportunities for farming and obtaining exclusive items.
festivals.info.activities.title: Unique Activities
festivals.info.activities.description: Each festival includes specific activities such as puzzles, races, combat events, and special events.
festivals.info.exclusiveItems.title: Exclusive Items
festivals.info.exclusiveItems.descriptio: Skins, weapons, and other items that are only available during the festival.
festivals.info.tempRewards.title: Temporary Rewards
festivals.info.tempRewards.description: Materials, currencies, and other resources that can be sold for gold on the Trading Post.
festivals.farming.title: Festival Farming Strategies
festivals.farming.during.title: During the Festival
festivals.farming.during.participate.des: Complete daily activities to obtain consistent rewards.
festivals.farming.during.intensive.title: Intensive Farming
festivals.farming.during.intensive.descr: Dedicate time to the most profitable activities of the festival.
festivals.farming.after.title: After the Festival
festivals.farming.after.selling.title: Strategic Selling
festivals.farming.after.selling.descript: Wait for prices to rise after the festival.
festivals.farming.after.analysis.title: Market Analysis
festivals.farming.after.analysis.descrip: Monitor prices to identify the best selling moment.
festivals.goldEarning.title: How to Earn Gold in Festivals?
festivals.goldEarning.description: Festivals are one of the best opportunities to generate gold in Guild Wars 2. Each festival has specific farming methods that can generate between 20-30g per hour depending on your efficiency and the festival in question.
festivals.goldEarning.main.title: Main Methods
festivals.goldEarning.main.activity.desc: Repeatedly participate in the most profitable activities of the festival.
festivals.goldEarning.main.containers.de: Open bags, envelopes, and other containers to obtain valuable items.
festivals.goldEarning.main.materials.des: Sell festival-specific materials on the Trading Post.
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.title: Advanced Strategies
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.storage.d: Save items to sell them in the next festival.
festivals.goldEarning.advanced.multiChar: Use several characters to maximize daily rewards.
festivals.goldEarning.proTip.title: Pro Tip
festivals.goldEarning.proTip.description: The most profitable festivals are usually Halloween (Trick-or-Treat Bags) and Wintersday (Wintersday Gifts). These can generate 30-40g per hour with efficient farming. Use our specific calculators to determine the exact profitability of each activity.
festivals.tips.title: General Tips
festivals.tips.planning.title: Planning
festivals.tips.planning.description: Research festivals in advance and prepare your characters.
festivals.tips.diversification.title: Diversification
festivals.tips.diversification.descripti: Don't focus on just one activity, explore all options.
festivals.tips.community.title: Community
festivals.tips.community.description: Join organized groups to maximize efficiency.
festivals.tips.enjoy.title: Enjoy
festivals.tips.enjoy.description: Remember that festivals are designed to be fun.
festivals.descriptions.lunar: The celebration of the new year in the Canthan calendar

festivals.descriptions.fourWinds: Summer festival with mount races and adventures

salvagePage.whatIsSalvagingDesc: Salvaging is the process of salvaging equipment to obtain materials. It is one of the most profitable ways to earn gold in Guild Wars 2, especially with certain types of items.

craftingPage.whatIsCraftingDesc: Crafting in Guild Wars 2 is a way to create objects, weapons, armor, and consumables. It's an excellent way to earn gold and obtain items for your character.
craftingPage.learnMoreGlossary: Learn more crafting concepts in the Glossary
craftingPage.conversionsDesc: Calculate the profitability of converting Tier 5 to Tier 6 materials through the Mystic Forge. Prices are updated in real-time from the Guild Wars 2 API.
craftingPage.benefits.sellItems: Sell items on the Trading Post
craftingPage.tips.startProfession: Start with a profession you like
craftingPage.tips.efficientLevelingDesc: Craft items you can sell to recover costs while leveling up
craftingPage.tips.cheapMaterialsDesc: Buy materials during low demand periods to save gold
craftingPage.tips.profitableRecipesDesc: Focus on recipes that have good demand on the Trading Post
craftingPage.tips.conversionsDesc: Convert lower tier materials to higher tier when profitable
craftingPage.advanced.marketAnalysisDesc: Monitor Trading Post prices to identify profitable crafting opportunities.
craftingPage.advanced.purchaseTimingDesc: Buy materials when prices are low, especially after events.
craftingPage.advanced.profitableConversi: Convert lower tier materials to higher tier when the price difference is favorable.
craftingPage.advanced.specializationDesc: Focus on one or two professions to maximize your efficiency and profits.
craftingPage.volatileMagicDesc: Volatile Magic is a currency stored in the wallet and is the main currency of Living World Season 4.
craftingPage.analysisRewards: Analysis of Rewards from Trophy Boxes

craftingPage.unboundMagicDesc: Unbound Magic is a currency stored in the wallet and is the main currency of Living World Season 3.

craftingPage.t6AnalysisSubtitle: Advanced calculator to maximize profit from material conversions and magic analysis
craftingPage.t6AnalysisDesc: This calculator analyzes the profitability of converting Tier 5 to Tier 6 materials, as well as the value of Volatile Magic and Unbound Magic. Data is based on analysis of 500k {trophyBoxes} and 400k {magicBoxes} opened.
craftingPage.t6ConversionsDesc: Profitable T5 to T6 material conversions using the Mystic Forge with precise droprate analysis

craftingPage.unboundMagicStrategy: Spend your Unbound Magic on {magicBoxes}, this will help you maximize profits.
craftingPage.droprateAnalysisDesc: Droprates are calculated with precision based on 500k {trophyBoxes} and 400k {magicBoxes} analyzed. Trust the data to make decisions.
craftingPage.currencyOptimizationDesc: Prioritize T6 conversions with higher Profit Max. Use {trophyBoxes} for Volatile Magic and {magicBoxes} for Unbound Magic.
craftingPage.continuousMonitoringDesc: Prices change constantly. Regularly check the tables to identify new opportunities.

dashboard.garden.title: Gardens
gardenPage.title: Garden Guide - Volatile Magic Farming
gardenPage.subtitle: Complete guide to maximize profits in this volatile magic farming
gardenPage.sidebar.title: Garden Guide
gardenPage.sections.introduction.title: What are Gardens?
gardenPage.sections.introduction.content: This farming method consists of searching for places across the maps where we will have a large accumulation of nodes, whether plants to harvest with a sickle or trees to harvest with an axe. Volatile Magic is an essential currency for the 4th Living World season obtained primarily through resource gathering.

For this farming to be truly interesting and give us the benefit we seek, we need to follow a small series of preliminary steps. From preparing the right tools to knowing the best routes and respawn times of the nodes.
gardenPage.sections.introduction.objecti: This guide will help you maximize your Volatile Magic earnings through garden farming, providing you with all the necessary information about which gardens, optimization tips, and farming strategies.
gardenPage.sections.gardenTypes.title: Gathering Tools
gardenPage.sections.gardenTypes.descript: To be more efficient with farming, you'll want to have one of the following gathering tools as their animation when gathering is considerably faster than others.
gardenPage.sections.glyphs.info: You will need at least 1 volatile magic glyph, on average, this glyph will give you 6 volatile magic per node.
gardenPage.sections.buffs.title: Buffs
gardenPage.sections.buffs.itemBooster.de: 33% chance to gain extra gathering strike
gardenPage.sections.buffs.itemBooster.no:
In the Home Instance, it only works on gardens.
Doesn't work in guild halls.
gardenPage.sections.buffs.experienceNote: Using experience boosters will gain you additional experience alongside a substantial amount of VM.
gardenPage.gardens.home.name: Personal Garden
gardenPage.gardens.home.description: Personal garden that you can cultivate in your guild hall or personal home
gardenPage.gardens.guild.name: Guild Gardens
gardenPage.gardens.guild.description: Community gardens in guild halls with special nodes
gardenPage.gardens.world.name: World Gardens
gardenPage.gardens.world.description: Special gardens in specific maps with rare nodes
gardenPage.gardens.seasonal.name: Seasonal Gardens
gardenPage.gardens.seasonal.description: Gardens that appear during special events and festivals
gardenPage.sections.plants.title: Plant Types and Rewards
gardenPage.plants.magicCrystals.name: Magic Crystals
gardenPage.plants.volatilityFlowers.name: Volatility Flowers
gardenPage.plants.energyTrees.name: Energy Trees
gardenPage.plants.legendaryPlants.name: Legendary Plants
gardenPage.sections.tips.title: Gardening Tips
gardenPage.tips.sustainableCultivation.d: Maintain a constant cultivation cycle to obtain Volatile Magic regularly. Plan your harvests and plantings to have a continuous flow of resources.
gardenPage.tips.harvestTiming.title: Harvest Timing
gardenPage.tips.harvestTiming.descriptio: Harvest at the exact moment to maximize the amount of Volatile Magic. Plants have optimal time windows for collection.
gardenPage.tips.plantVariety.title: Plant Variety
gardenPage.tips.plantVariety.description: Cultivate different types of plants to obtain different amounts of magic. Diversity in your garden maximizes total rewards.
gardenPage.tips.smartInvestment.title: Smart Investment
gardenPage.tips.smartInvestment.descript: Invest in quality gardening tools for better results. Superior tools increase efficiency and rewards.
gardenPage.sections.waypoints.title: Garden Waypoints
gardenPage.sections.waypoints.descriptio: Direct links to the most important garden waypoints for Volatile Magic farming
gardenPage.sections.rewards.title: Benefit/Profit
gardenPage.sections.locations.title: Garden Locations
gardenPage.sections.locations.descriptio: You are able to do the route in any order, so long it is done quickly.

giftOfMasteryPage.title: Gift of Mastery - GOM
giftOfMasteryPage.error.title: Error loading item
giftOfMasteryPage.itemDescription: An exceptional gift that symbolizes mastery in content creation and craftsmanship. This item is highly valued by the most talented creators in the GOM (Guild of Makers) community.
giftOfMasteryPage.features.mastery.title: Mastery
giftOfMasteryPage.features.mastery.descr: Represents the highest level of skill and knowledge in content creation
giftOfMasteryPage.features.excellence.de: Symbolizes the constant pursuit of perfection and superior quality
giftOfMasteryPage.features.leadership.de: Recognizes those who guide and inspire others in the community
giftOfMasteryPage.features.craftsmanship: Celebrates technical skill and dedication to the craft
giftOfMasteryPage.features.creation.desc: Honors the ability to create innovative and valuable content
giftOfMasteryPage.features.innovation.de: Recognizes revolutionary ideas and creative approaches
giftOfMasteryPage.additionalInfo.title: Additional Information
giftOfMasteryPage.additionalInfo.about.d: The Gift of Mastery is a special item from the Guild of Makers that recognizes excellence in content creation and digital craftsmanship.
giftOfMasteryPage.additionalInfo.signifi: This item represents not only technical skill, but also dedication to the community and the desire to share knowledge.
giftOfMasteryPage.buyer.description: When you want to pay another player for their {itemName} you will need practically everything that can be paid when making a legendary. Here is a list of items to buy so you can keep in mind what's necessary:
giftOfMasteryPage.buyer.title: What does the buyer need?
giftOfMasteryPage.seller.title: What does the seller need?
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.title: Tips
giftOfMasteryPage.menu.title: Menu
giftOfMasteryPage.seller.description: In case you are the seller, you will have to have all this prepared:
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.description: Finally, I would like to give you a few tips to carry out the trade as best as possible:
giftOfMasteryPage.notes.clovers: Only if the seller does NOT include their clovers
giftOfMasteryPage.notes.extra: These are paid separately as extra
giftOfMasteryPage.thumbnail.alt: Complete Gift of Mastery Guide - How to sell GOMs
giftOfMasteryPage.process.step1: The seller will link all objects in chat to show they have everything.
giftOfMasteryPage.process.step2: The buyer will send the materials to the seller, either gift by gift or all at once.
giftOfMasteryPage.process.step3: The seller will create the legendary weapon requested with these following a legendary creation guide, I recommend the {wikiLink}
giftOfMasteryPage.process.step4: Once the legendary is made, it will be sent to the buyer
giftOfMasteryPage.process.step5: When the buyer receives the legendary, they will send the agreed payment for this GOM
giftOfMasteryPage.process.note: A very important point is the creation of mystic clovers. When the 231 coins and 231 ectos are sent to the seller, they will have to throw them into the forge until they get the 77 clovers. If there are leftover coins and ectoplasms, they would keep them as well as EVERYTHING that comes out of the forge. If they don't reach the required amount, they would have to put in the missing ones from their own pocket.
giftOfMasteryPage.process.title: How is the process carried out?
giftOfMasteryPage.process.description: Once you are both in a group and ready for it, we will follow a very simple process:
giftOfMasteryPage.price.title: Current Price
giftOfMasteryPage.price.updateNote: (Will be updated every time it changes)
giftOfMasteryPage.discord.title: Where to buy/sell GOMs
giftOfMasteryPage.discord.description: If you are thinking of buying or selling your gifts of mastery, I definitely recommend the Overflow Trading Company discord.
giftOfMasteryPage.discord.subtitle: A discord server dedicated to trading with more than 20,000 members
giftOfMasteryPage.buyer.ectoplasmNote: 231 of these only if the seller does NOT include mystic clovers
giftOfMasteryPage.seller.obsidianNote: 231 only if you are NOT going to put your clovers
giftOfMasteryPage.seller.spiritShardNote: 140 only if you are NOT going to put your clovers
giftOfMasteryPage.seller.giftRecipesDesc: (2 per legendary, 10 gold each recipe at Miyani)
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.contract.title: 1. Chat Contract
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.contract.descript: Before making the trade, make a "contract" in team chat. This is proof so that Arenanet is more open to intervening in case of a scam.
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.contract.example: Hello name.1234 we are going to make LEGENDARY with your Gift of Mastery in exchange for X gold. I will send you the materials and when you have it, send it to me and I will send you the payment. Agreed?
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.contract.response: The other player will have to put "Yes" "Okay" "Ok" "Alright" or anything affirmative. Then we will take a screenshot.
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.screenshots.title: 2. Screenshots
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.screenshots.descr: Always screenshot when we are going to send the emails (before pressing the button). This is to make sure you have proof and in case you get confused sending to the wrong person or if you send the wrong materials you can review.
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.paymentOrder.desc: Payment is always made after receiving the legendary, in case it's through Overflow it could be accepted that payment is sent first if the buyer has no reputation and the seller does.
giftOfMasteryPage.tips.goodLuck: Good luck with selling and buying GOMs!
salvageCommon.title: Unidentified Gear - Common
salvageCommon.description: Calculate how much gold you earn by opening and salvaging Piece of Common Unidentified Gear
salvageCommon.note: Prices are obtained in real-time from the GW2 API. The "Processed Price" includes Trading Post fees (15% discount on sell price). The cost of Unidentified Gear uses the current buy price from the Trading Post. Drop rates are based on official data from the GW2 Wiki for Piece of Common Unidentified Gear (Common) opened and then salvaged with Copper-Fed Salvage-o-Matic. Recommendation: Have an inventory of 280 slots to facilitate the process.

researchNotesPage.title: Research Notes
researchNotesPage.subtitle: Calculate the cost and efficiency of obtaining Research Notes through salvaging. Maximize your profits by understanding the true cost per note.
researchNotesPage.tip1: Use appropriate salvage kits for each rarity
researchNotesPage.tip2: Check current market prices before salvaging
researchNotesPage.tip3: Consider the value of materials you might get
researchNotesPage.tip4: Research Notes are used in crafting ascended gear
researchNotesPage.tip5: Prices can fluctuate based on crafting demand
researchNotesPage.tip6: Bulk salvaging can reduce overall costs
researchNotesPage.tip7: Research Notes are a currency and crafting material earned by salvaging crafted items with a Research Kit, or by toggling the option to automatically research crafted items in the crafting interface. They are automatically stored in the wallet upon acquisition.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.title: Orrian Jewelry Box
orrianJewelryBoxPage.subtitle: Analyze the value and profitability of this mysterious box from Orr.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.sellAndVendor: Sell on Market and Sell to Vendor
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip1: Boxes can contain jewelry of different rarities
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip2: Consider expected value vs. purchase price
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip4: Check prices before buying or selling
orrianJewelryBoxPage.noMarketDataDesc: This box cannot be traded on the market. This means you can only open it to get its contents or sell it to an NPC vendor.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.vendorTip: The vendor value is only 256 copper. It's better to open the box to get jewelry that may be worth more.
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip7: This box cannot be traded, only opened
orrianJewelryBoxPage.tip8: The vendor value is very low, better to open

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.agreementDescription: Welcome to True Farming! These Terms govern the use of our website and services related to Guild Wars 2. By using our services, you accept these Terms.
termsOfService.serviceDescriptionText: True Farming provides tools to optimize farming in Guild Wars 2:
termsOfService.acceptableUseDescription: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes. You agree NOT to:
termsOfService.acceptableUse.noUnauthori: Attempt unauthorized access to our systems
termsOfService.acceptableUse.noImpersona: Impersonate others or provide false information
termsOfService.intellectualProperty.gw2C: Guild Wars 2 is a trademark of ArenaNet, LLC. We are not affiliated with ArenaNet or NCsoft. All Guild Wars 2 content remains the property of ArenaNet.
termsOfService.disclaimers.asIs: Our services are provided "as is" without warranties
termsOfService.disclaimers.noLiability: We are not responsible for losses or damages resulting from use of our services
termsOfService.disclaimers.noAffiliation: We are not affiliated with ArenaNet, NCsoft or Guild Wars 2
cookieBanner.title: We use cookies to enhance your experience
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to make our site work, analytics cookies to understand how you use our site, and advertising cookies to show you relevant content. You can choose which cookies to accept.
cookieSettings.title: Cookie Settings
cookieSettings.description: We use different types of cookies to provide and improve our services. You can customize your preferences below.
cookieSettings.essential.title: Essential Cookies
cookieSettings.essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled.
cookieSettings.essential.features: Authentication, security, user preferences and session management
cookieSettings.analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
cookieSettings.analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website so we can improve it.
cookieSettings.analytics.features: Page views, website performance, error tracking and usage patterns
cookieSettings.advertising.title: Advertising Cookies
cookieSettings.advertising.description: These cookies are used to display relevant advertisements and measure their effectiveness.
cookieSettings.advertising.features: Personalized ad content, performance measurement and retargeting campaigns
cookieSettings.info.title: Your choices matter
cookieSettings.info.description: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. Some features may not work properly if you disable certain types of cookies.
glossary.title: GW2 Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Complete guide of important concepts and terms for earning gold in Guild Wars 2
glossary.items.salvaging.title: Salvaging
glossary.items.salvaging.description: Process of breaking down equipment and objects to obtain basic materials. Materials can be sold on the Trading Post or used for crafting. Salvaging is fundamental to the game's economy.
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip1: Salvage kits have different success rates
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip2: Some rare items can yield valuable materials
glossary.items.salvaging.tips.tip3: Salvaging can generate Luck for the player
glossary.items.salvageKits.title: Salvage Kits
glossary.items.salvageKits.description: Tools that allow breaking down objects into materials. Each kit has a specific success rate and cost per use. Higher quality kits have greater probability of obtaining rare materials.
glossary.items.luckCalculator.title: Luck Calculator
glossary.items.luckCalculator.descriptio: Tool to calculate the efficiency of cost per Luck point obtained when salvaging objects. Luck is a progression system that permanently increases character statistics.
glossary.items.researchNotes.title: Research Notes
glossary.items.researchNotes.description: Special currency obtained by salvaging crafted objects with a Research Kit. Used to unlock ascended crafting recipes and are automatically stored in the wallet.
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.title: Farming Routes
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.description: Optimized sequences of activities to maximize gold per hour. Include specific waypoints, event rotations, and strategies for different content types.
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip1: Routes adapt to different experience levels
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip2: Some routes require access to specific expansions
glossary.items.farmingRoutes.tips.tip3: Routes can be individual or group-based
glossary.items.festivals.title: Festivals
glossary.items.festivals.description: Seasonal events that occur on specific dates of the real year. Offer unique content, exclusive rewards, and special activities not available at other times.
glossary.items.festivals.tips.tip1: Festivals follow the real world calendar
glossary.items.festivals.tips.tip2: Each festival has unique mechanics and rewards
glossary.noResults.title: No results found
glossary.noResults.description: Try adjusting your search terms or category filter
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.title: Gift of Jade Mastery - GOJM
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.loading: Loading Gift of Jade Mastery information...
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.error.title: Error loading item
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.menu.title: Menu
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.buyer.title: What does the buyer need?
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.buyer.description: When you want to pay another player for their Gift of Jade Mastery, you'll need practically everything that can be paid when making a legendary. Here's a list of items to buy so you know what's necessary:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.buyer.ectoplasmNot: 231 of these only if the seller does NOT include mystic clovers
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.title: What does the seller need?
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.description: In case you are the seller, you will have to have all this prepared:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.obsidianNot: 231 only if you are NOT going to put your clovers
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.spiritShard: 140 only if you are NOT going to put your clovers
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.giftRecipes: (2 per legendary, 10 gold each recipe at Miyani)
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.title: How is the process carried out?
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.descriptio: Once you are both in a group and ready for it, we will carry out a very simple process:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step1: The seller will link all objects in chat to verify they have everything.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step2: The buyer will send the materials to the seller, either gift by gift or all at once.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step3: The seller will create the legendary that is requested with these following a legendary creation guide, I recommend the {wikiLink}
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step4: Once the legendary is made, it will be sent to the buyer
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step5: When the buyer receives the legendary, they will send the agreed payment for this GOJM
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.note: When 115 coins and 115 ectos are sent to the seller, they will have to forge until 38 clovers come out. If coins and ectoplasms are left over, they would keep them just like EVERYTHING that comes out of the forge. If it doesn't reach, they would have to put the missing ones from their pocket.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.notes.clovers: Only if the seller does NOT include their clovers
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.notes.extra: These are paid separately as extra
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.price.title: Price
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.price.updateNote: The price will be updated every time it changes
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.discord.title: Discord
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.discord.descriptio: To contact us and place orders, join our Discord server:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.discord.subtitle: Official GW2 Overflow server
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.title: Important Tips
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.description: To ensure a successful and secure transaction, follow these tips:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.contract.desc: Always establish a clear contract via chat before starting:
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.contract.exam: S: Selling GOJM for 550g, do you accept? B: Yes, I accept. S: Perfect, send me the materials.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.contract.resp: The seller must confirm before proceeding
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.screenshots.d: Take screenshots of the entire conversation and transaction as backup.
Payment is made AFTER receiving the legendary, never before.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.tips.goodLuck: Good luck with selling and buying GOJMs!
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.thumbnail.alt: Complete Gift of Jade Mastery guide - How to sell GOJMs
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.sidebar.title: GOJM Guide
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.seller.masteryTitl: Complete Central Tyria Legendary Crafting Mastery Track

giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step2Text: The buyer will send the materials to the seller, either gift by gift or all at once.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step3Text: The seller will create the legendary that is requested with these following a legendary creation guide, I recommend the
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step4Text: Once the legendary is made, it will be sent to the buyer.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.step5Text: When the buyer receives the legendary, they will send the agreed payment for this GOJM.
giftOfJadeMasteryPage.process.noteText: When 115 coins and 115 ectos are sent to the seller, they will have to forge until 38 clovers come out. If coins and ectoplasms are left over, they would keep them just like EVERYTHING that comes out of the forge. If it doesn't reach, they would have to put the missing ones from their pocket.
conversionGuidePage.title: T6 Conversion Guide
conversionGuidePage.subtitle: Learn to maximize your profits with T5 to T6 material conversions and Spiritual Shard sales
conversionGuidePage.sidebar.title: Conversion Guide
conversionGuidePage.sections.introductio: The vast majority of Guild Wars 2 players have a large amount of spiritual shards but little gold to rent them. That's why there's something we call "Spiritual Shard Sales" that usually happens with T5 to T6 conversions.

This is not mandatory to do for other players, in fact, it's more beneficial to do it for yourself. But of course, it also carries its risks. So here I'm going to explain how to do "T6 Conversions" and how to sell shards to those who want conversions.
conversionGuidePage.sections.conversionP: A conversion basically means upgrading tier 5 materials to their higher tier.
For this we will use the Mystic Forge and follow the following recipe:
Here we can change the type of tier 5 and tier 6 for other conversions but making sure they always match in type. Dust cannot be upgraded.

Every time we make a conversion we will get between 5 and 12 Tier 6 back. On average we will gain 6.05 Tier 6 per roll, that is, 242 T6 for every 2,000 T5. Why did I mention that exact figure? Well, now we'll see.
conversionGuidePage.sections.asBuyer.con: When buying, it's usually done in batches of 140 spiritual shards, that is, 280 transformations. It's necessary to do this type of trades in a guild bank because otherwise, we'll spend 1 hour passing materials through mail.
When we have a common bank for both buyer and seller, as buyers we will put in a bank slot:
conversionGuidePage.sections.asBuyer.mat: 8 stacks of each of the 7 tier 5 materials:
conversionGuidePage.sections.asBuyer.pay: 35 gold payment when receiving tier 6 materials
conversionGuidePage.sections.asBuyer.con: Once this is done, we just have to wait for the materials to be returned to us. Normally there should be 242 on average of each. That is, if we add up the Tier 6 of each type that they send back to us and divide by 7 it should be close to 242.
Sometimes probability makes it quite a bit less and other times quite a bit more, but take a look just in case.
conversionGuidePage.sections.asSeller.co: When we are the sellers we have to go to the bank and collect the materials mentioned in the seller part. For better optimization of our time when using the Mystic Forge, we will set up the inventory like this: 2 free slots, 200 T6 dust, 2,000 Tier 5.

In those 2 slots we could put 1 Tier 6, our own that we could collect again when finished if we wanted, and 200 philosopher's stones. These stones we will buy from Miyani at the Mystic Forge for 1 spiritual shard in exchange for 10 philosopher's stones.
Now we will put the recipe explained at the beginning into the Mystic Forge and send all the Tier 6 materials to the buyer. They will send us the payment, 35 gold, for the 140 spiritual shards.
If you want to make this type of deals you have both buyers and sellers on the Discord server of
conversionGuidePage.images.conversionTab: T6 conversion table with materials and prices
conversionGuidePage.images.conversionRec: Mystic Forge - T5 to T6 Conversion Recipe
conversionGuidePage.images.philosopherSt: Philosopher's stones at the Mystic Forge
